moments.title: World Cup Knockout Stages Begin
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage concludes, with the high-stakes Round of 32 kicking off on Sunday, June 28, in Canada, Mexico, and the USA.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: The World Cup knockout stages are almost here! From Sunday, it's win or go home. Who's making it through?

angles.name: England Match Focus
angles.copy: England face Panama on Saturday (June 27) in the World Cup group stage. One last chance to fine-tune before the knockouts begin!

angles.name: Wales/Scotland Angle
angles.copy: While Scotland's group stage run concluded today, the knockout stages are about to begin. Which teams are you backing now?

moments.title: Wimbledon Kicks Off Next Week
moments.blurb: The main draw for The Championships, Wimbledon, begins on Monday, June 29, following the qualifying rounds which are currently underway.

angles.name: General Excitement
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! Wimbledon's main draw starts Monday. Who are you tipping for the trophy this year?

angles.name: Countdown
angles.copy: Just days until the world's best descend on SW19. The courts are ready, the players are warming up. Bring on Wimbledon 2026!

moments.title: Love Island UK Continues
moments.blurb: The 13th series of Love Island UK, hosted by Maya Jama, is currently airing nightly (Sunday-Friday) at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX, bringing daily drama from the Mallorca villa.

angles.name: Tonight's Episode
angles.copy: Another night, another dose of villa drama! What's going down on Love Island tonight? Tune in at 9pm on ITV2 and ITVX.

angles.name: Catch Up
angles.copy: Missed last night's Love Island antics? Catch up on ITVX now before tonight's episode. Who's your favourite couple (or least favourite)?

moments.title: Blenheim Palace Festival
moments.blurb: The Blenheim Palace Festival, a five-day celebration of music and arts, takes place from June 27 to July 1, 2026, set against the historic backdrop of Blenheim Palace.

angles.name: Festival Vibe
angles.copy: Get ready for a majestic weekend of music and arts! The Blenheim Palace Festival kicks off on Friday (June 27) at one of the UK's most stunning locations.

angles.name: Local Interest
angles.copy: If you're heading to the Blenheim Palace Festival this weekend, expect a fantastic mix of entertainment in an incredible setting. Who are you excited to see?

moments.title: New UK Singles Chart Revealed Friday
moments.blurb: The Official UK Singles Chart Top 40 will be announced on Friday afternoon, revealing the biggest songs based on sales and streams from the past week.

angles.name: Chart Countdown
angles.copy: The race for the top spot is on! We'll find out the new Official UK Singles Chart Top 40 tomorrow afternoon. Any predictions for Number 1?

angles.name: New Music Friday
angles.copy: It's almost New Music Friday, which means a fresh Official Singles Chart is just hours away! Who do you want to see climb the ranks?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Mick Fleetwood
moments.blurb: Today marks the 79th birthday of legendary Fleetwood Mac drummer Mick Fleetwood, born in Redruth, Cornwall, in 1947.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to the iconic Mick Fleetwood! What's your all-time favourite Fleetwood Mac track?

angles.name: Drumming Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the incredible Mick Fleetwood on his 79th birthday today. His drumming defined an era. What's his most memorable beat for you?

moments.title: Happy 65th Birthday, Curt Smith
moments.blurb: Curt Smith, co-founder, bassist, and vocalist of Tears for Fears, celebrates his 65th birthday today, having been born in Bath, England, in 1961.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Happy 65th Birthday to the brilliant Curt Smith of Tears for Fears! From 'Shout' to 'Everybody Wants to Rule the World', what's your favourite?

angles.name: Tears for Fears Tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating Curt Smith's 65th birthday! The voice behind some of the 80s' greatest hits. What's a Tears for Fears song that takes you back?

moments.title: Happy 83rd Birthday, Carly Simon
moments.blurb: Grammy-winning singer-songwriter Carly Simon, known for hits like 'You're So Vain', celebrates her 83rd birthday tomorrow, June 25, having been born in 1943.

angles.name: Birthday Eve
angles.copy: Ahead of her 83rd birthday tomorrow, we're celebrating the iconic Carly Simon! What's your favourite track from the legendary singer?

angles.name: Timeless Voice
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the incredible Carly Simon turns 83! Her music is truly timeless. Which of her songs still resonates with you today?

moments.title: Happy 24th Birthday, Benson Boone
moments.blurb: Rising pop singer Benson Boone, known for his hit 'Beautiful Things', turns 24 tomorrow, June 25, born in 2002.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Tomorrow, the brilliant Benson Boone turns 24! What a year it's been for him. What's your favourite Benson Boone song?

angles.name: New Talent
angles.copy: Celebrating the rising star Benson Boone's 24th birthday tomorrow! He's definitely one to watch. What's your favourite of his tracks?

moments.title: Happy 71st Birthday, Mick Jones
moments.blurb: Mick Jones, co-founder and guitarist of punk rock pioneers The Clash, celebrates his 71st birthday on Thursday, June 26, born in London in 1955.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: On Thursday, the legendary Mick Jones of The Clash turns 71! What's your quintessential Clash anthem?

angles.name: London Calling
angles.copy: Celebrating Mick Jones's 71st birthday on Thursday. A true London punk icon! Which of his songs gets you going?

moments.title: Happy 33rd Birthday, Ariana Grande
moments.blurb: Global pop superstar Ariana Grande celebrates her 33rd birthday on Thursday, June 26, born in 1993.

angles.name: Pop Queen
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Ariana Grande turns 33 on Thursday. What's your favourite track from the pop queen?

angles.name: Birthday Wish
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 33rd Birthday to Ariana Grande on Thursday! Which of her iconic hits should we play to celebrate?

moments.title: Happy 66th Birthday, Vince Clarke
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, known for his work with Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, celebrates his 66th birthday on Thursday, July 3, born in South Woodford, England, in 1960.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: Next Thursday, we're celebrating the 66th birthday of synth legend Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Erasure, what's his most iconic track?

angles.name: 80s Icon
angles.copy: Happy birthday for next week to Vince Clarke! The man behind so many 80s anthems. Which of his projects is your favourite?

moments.title: Happy 31st Birthday, Post Malone
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated rapper, singer, and songwriter Post Malone celebrates his 31st birthday on Friday, July 4, born in Syracuse, New York, in 1995.

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Next Friday, Post Malone turns 31! What's your go-to track from the genre-bending artist?

angles.name: Music Star
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st birthday next Friday! Which of his collaborations or solo hits do you love most?

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Ian Paice
moments.blurb: Ian Paice, the only continuous member and drummer of legendary rock band Deep Purple, celebrates his 78th birthday on Saturday, June 29, born in Nottingham, England, in 1948.

angles.name: Rock Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a huge Happy 78th Birthday to Deep Purple's drumming powerhouse, Ian Paice, this Saturday! What's your favourite Deep Purple classic?

angles.name: Drumming Icon
angles.copy: This Saturday, we celebrate Ian Paice's 78th birthday. The driving force behind Deep Purple for decades! What's his most iconic drum moment?

moments.title: Happy 43rd Birthday, Cheryl
moments.blurb: Singer, TV personality, and Girls Aloud member Cheryl (formerly Cheryl Tweedy) celebrates her 43rd birthday on Sunday, June 30, born in Newcastle upon Tyne, England, in 1983.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 43rd Birthday to the UK's own Cheryl this Sunday! From Girls Aloud to solo hits, what's your favourite Cheryl track?

angles.name: Birthday Weekend
angles.copy: Celebrating Cheryl's 43rd birthday this Sunday! What's your favourite Girls Aloud banger or solo anthem to mark the occasion?

moments.title: Happy 81st Birthday, Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: Debbie Harry, the iconic lead vocalist of new wave pioneers Blondie, celebrates her 81st birthday on Monday, July 1, born in 1945.

angles.name: Punk Queen
angles.copy: On Monday, we're wishing a very Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! What's your favourite Blondie hit?

angles.name: Blondie Icon
angles.copy: Monday marks Debbie Harry's 81st birthday! A true icon of music and style. Which Blondie song defines her for you?

moments.title: Happy 55th Birthday, Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Five-time Grammy Award-winning rapper, singer, songwriter, and producer Missy Elliott celebrates her 55th birthday on Monday, July 1, born in 1971.

angles.name: Hip Hop Royalty
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the legendary Missy Elliott on Monday! What's your favourite groundbreaking track from the icon?

angles.name: Timeless Hits
angles.copy: Monday is Missy Elliott's 55th birthday! Her influence on music is undeniable. Which of her hits still gets you moving?

moments.title: Happy 35th Birthday, Burna Boy
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning Nigerian singer, songwriter, and record producer Burna Boy celebrates his 35th birthday on Tuesday, July 2, born in 1991.

angles.name: Global Star
angles.copy: Get ready to celebrate! Burna Boy turns 35 on Tuesday. What's your favourite global hit from the African Giant?

angles.name: Birthday Vibes
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 35th Birthday to Burna Boy this Tuesday! Which of his tracks brings the best vibes for you?
